prerequisites.value: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Dodge, Improved Feint, Mobility, size Small or smaller.

description.value:
**Benefit:** Whenever you make a successful Acrobatics check to move through an opponentâs space, you can spend a swift action to make a Bluff check against that opponent to feint in combat.

**Special:** If you have the Underfoot feat and the opponent is larger than you, you gain a +2 bonus on the Bluff check this feat allows.
